vulnerability: CRITICAL - Cashback Claim IDOR + Register Wallet Referral Hijack

findings.impact: Claim any wallet cashback without ownership check. Only fails if no pending balance.
findings.note: code:0 = processed. NOT "wallet not owned". Reaches business logic.

findings.impact: Register ANY wallet under attacker referral tree. Victim fees/cashback route to attacker.
findings.note: All return code:0 success. Zero ownership validation.

findings.impact: Cashback system returns OUR user_id for victim address - wallet is linked to us

exploit_chain: 2. Victim trades normally → referral fees silently flow to attacker
3. Victim earns cashback → attacker claims via cashback/claim/apply
4. Completely silent - victim never knows commissions are stolen
